title: Pleurostima brevifolia
taxonomy: Pleurostima brevifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the African violet family. The Gesneriaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants, with over 3,000 species found in tropical and subtropical regions worldwide. The family is characterized by its unique flowers and leaves, and is often divided into several subfamilies. The classification of Pleurostima brevifolia is further refined to the genus Pleurostima, which is a small group of plants found in tropical Africa.
